arts.ttl: Man United and Arsenal ‘ready to make significant offer’ for 70-goal, 42-assist Premier League star; Spurs also willing to break record – report
arts.sum: A host of Premier League clubs are circling around Wolves star Matheus Cunha, who has emerged as one of the most in-demand attackers ahead of the summer transfer window. Despite Wolves’ inconsistencies this season, the Brazilian forward has been in sensational form, registering 15 goals and 4 assists in 29 appearances across all competitions. arts.ttl: Andre Onana has already given perfect response to being dropped after brutal Man United decision
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news and opinion as the goalkeeper is not part of the travelling squad for the Premier League clash against Newcastle United on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane responds to brutal Andre Onana Man United decision with Ruben Amorim theory
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana is a notable omission from the squad that will travel to St James' Park to take on Champions League hopefuls Newcastle

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Man United LIVE: Andre Onana left out of Premier League squad after costly errors
arts.sum: Altay Bayindir is set to make his Premier League debut at St James’ Park

arts.ttl: Everything we know about Eddie Howe as Newcastle United boss taken into hospital before Man Utd
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe was taken ill in midweek before being admitted to hospital on Friday night as a precaution leading up to Sunday afternoon's clash with Manchester United. Howe was bedridden for a number of days with an illness as Tindall took charge of the customary pre-match press conference duties in midweek.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe Newcastle United return date update with Crystal Palace training plan in place
arts.sum: Eddie Howe is understood to be on the mend after being admitted to hospital on Friday night - but Newcastle United club chiefs say the head coach's wellbeing is of paramount importance as he starts his recovery. But Newcastle top brass feel that they are in safe hands with Tindall, Graeme Jones, Stephen Purchess and Simon Weatherstone all ensuring that top standards are adhered to while Howe is recovering.

arts.ttl: Altay Bayindir and three others drop Man United team news hints ahead of Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Manchester United will go in search of a Premier League victory at St James' Park for the first time since March

arts.ttl: Who is Harry Amass? Ruben Amorim hands Man Utd teen first Premier League start at Newcastle
arts.sum: Harry Amass has been knocking on the door of a first Premier League start and Ruben Amorim is set to give the teenager the opportunity against Newcastle on Sunday

arts.ttl: Newcastle United star reacts to Eddie Howe news but makes one thing clear
arts.sum: Fabian Schar admits that there can be no drop off from Newcastle United's intensity in the build-up to the encounter with Manchester United - revealing that Eddie Howe has been recording training sessions. Schar told beIN Sports: "We know he is going to watch the training session back so the intensity is there.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make OFFICIAL offer for WORLD CLASS Brazilian
arts.sum: An official Man Utd offer for Brazilian sensation Ederson is imminent, according to Tuttomercatoweb. Ederson is regarded as possibly the most consistent central midfielder in Serie A over the last two years.
